content:
At the moment the recommended version is 0.56.0, but bindgen's latest version is 0.63.0.

If we upgrade to a newer version, we will have https://github.com/rust-lang/rust-bindgen/issues/2094 fixed and simplify the panic handler.

Why is bindgen not updated?

That is https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/pull/931, but if we update to rustc 1.66.0 (which is my plan, released yesterday), we can use one of the other features from the new bindgen (see the PR for details).
